recommendations.title: Get a Clue
recommendations.overview: A wealthy student with too much fashion sense, her equally rich friends, and her rival/superior from the school paper work together to solve the case when their teacher goes missing.

recommendations.title: Nowhere to Be Found
recommendations.overview: A mother's worst nightmare comes true when her teenage daughter goes missing.

recommendations.title: Frenemies
recommendations.overview: Three pairs of friends relationships go from good to bad and back again. Several couple fall out over girls, boys and work. Can all these couples settle their differences and be friends again?

recommendations.title: The Wizards Return: Alex vs. Alex
recommendations.overview: While trying to prove to her family she can be mature and responsible, teen wizard Alex Russo conjures up a spell to rid herself of her bad qualities, unintentionally creating a Good and Evil Alex. When Evil Alex gets involved in a plan to take over

recommendations.title: The Cheetah Girls
recommendations.genres: Family, Comedy, Drama, Music, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: A four-member teen girl group named the Cheetah Girls go to a Manhattan High School for the Performing Arts and try to become the first freshmen to win the talent show in the school's history. During the talent show auditions, they meet a big-time pr

recommendations.title: Boys
recommendations.overview: Two teen track stars discover first love as they train for the biggest relay race of their young lives.

recommendations.title: Switching Goals
recommendations.overview: Twin sisters Emma and Sam come up with a scheme to switch places so each can play in the soccer team they prefer.

recommendations.title: Double, Double, Toil and Trouble
recommendations.genres: Family, TV Movie, Horror, Comedy, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: On Halloween night, two precocious little girls try to save their parents from their nasty old capitalist aunt's greedy clutches. Magic abounds and they meet mysterious new friends along the way.

recommendations.title: Phineas and Ferb: Mission Marvel
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Comedy, TV Movie, Action, Adventure, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Phineas and Ferb team up with the Avengers to save the world from Dr. Doofenshmirtz and a group of dangerous supervillains.

recommendations.title: The Jetsons Meet the Flintstones
recommendations.genres: Animation, Family, Science Fiction, TV Movie, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Elroy Jetson invents a time machine that takes him back to prehistoric times, where he meets the Flintstone family.
